title: Weekly Dry Time Charter Estimates, August 04 2021
section_path: Weekly Dry Time Charter Estimates, August 04 2021
section_path_text: Weekly Dry Time Charter Estimates, August 04 2021
summary:
Main
A stable week for the capesize period marker with some short-term activity reported in the pacific. Kamsarmax/panamax rates dipped slightly this week with demand low in the Atlantic. Some echoing of this in the pacific although the south, whilst experiencing some pressure, continues to see activity on the Indonesia to China route.
